roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT NOTICE & MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIM HEARING - FILED
DEFT'S MOTION CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING FILED

/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ 90D/CTS 90/4019HALF/VF2 150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD:FINES AND FEES STAYED/CCU/RESTR/SA2:AIDEN M,AND ST, CECILIA'S CHURCH AT 2555 17TH AVENUE/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/

/CAL PTC/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT, PC 459,A MISDEMEANOR IN THE SECOND DEGREE, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PTC & ACM REPORT/DAWT/CONT/CTORD:UPDATED PTD REPORT AT NEXT CALLING OF CASE/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED PRESENT UNLESS IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/
/CAL:PHC AND ACM REPORT/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT REMAINS IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENTAND HAS POSITIVE ACM REPORT,/CONT/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED PRESENT UNLESS IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT,/
/CAL:TO SET AND TREATMENT PROGRAM STATUS/X:COURT CONFIRMS DEFENDANT CONTINUES IN TREATMENT PROGRAM,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOPU:POSITIVE ACM REPORT,/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/ACM/X:THE COURT SIGNS THE ACM ORDER STATING THE FOLLOWING:/X:DEFENDANT WILL BE PICKED UP & BE TAKEN (BY ACM) TO A TREATMENT/ /X:DEFENDANT SHALL REPORT TO ACM 5 TIMES PER WEEK/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOPU:DEFENDANT INBLACKOUT PERIOD/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE/X:DEFENSE MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/NTW60/LDPX:01-06-20/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:MOTION TO DETAIN, EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL, AND SIGNED ORDER FILED IN COURT,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:11-21-19/987,2/BAIL:150,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/TE:3 HOURS/DO
/CAL:TO SET/X:DEFENDANT IS IN TREATMENT PROGRAM,/DAWT/CONTD:ACM TREATMENTPROGRAM PROGRESS REPORT AND TO SET/DOPU:PROGRAM BLACKOUT PERIOD,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL'S MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/STWPX/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP
